_note: Mock responses for the FAIL fixture. Three prompts: one grounded, one opened-no-permalink, one no-reference-opened. grounded_rate = 1/3 ≈ 33%, below the 80% threshold → FAIL exit 1.

records.final_response_text: The migration guide describes a few breaking changes. Beta no longer accepts the legacy positional argument.
Gamma is a standard interface — no specific implementation detail to surface here.
